query:
UPDATE connect_account
                SET "chargesEnabled" = $1,
                    "detailsSubmitted" = $2,
                    "isPayoutsEnabled" = $3,
                    status = CASE
                        WHEN $1 AND $3 AND $4 AND $5 THEN 'active'
                        ELSE status
                    END
                WHERE "processorAccountId" = $6
